utterance:
{
  "utterance": "With a grand vision, we will build a revolutionary platform that uses AI to empower the visually impaired, transforming their daily lives with seamless navigation and real-time object recognition. This is not just a tool—it's a beacon of hope.",
  "title": "Eyes of the Future",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "Our platform combines advanced AI with haptic feedback to provide real-time, accessible information, addressing a critical social issue with innovative technology.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "Empower the outcasts of the digital world with a platform that turns emotional expression into connection and belonging. This is not just an app; it's a revolution.",
  "title": "EmotiConnect",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "EmotiConnect uses emotional expression as a means of connection, addressing social isolation and providing a safe space for marginalized communities to find belonging.",
  "your_role": "pm_visionary"
}

{
  "utterance": "We're building a scalable data labeling platform that accelerates the development of AI models for environmental monitoring, enabling real-time analysis of satellite imagery to detect deforestation and pollution. This platform will provide a massive dataset to train models that can predict and mitigate environmental damage.",
  "title": "GreenGuardian: Real-Time Environmental Monitoring",
  "track": "T01",
  "core_insight": "GreenGuardian uniquely addresses the critical need for large, high-quality datasets in environmental AI, providing a scalable solution that can be integrated into existing satellite and drone systems to monitor and protect our planet in real-time.",
  "your_role": "Tech Lead"
}

{
  "utterance": "What if we created a platform where users can upload their deepest darkest secrets, and in return, receive personalized advice from AI-generated avatars that look exactly like their darkest fears? It’s creepy, but it works.",
  "title": "Nightmares & Advice",
  "track": "T03",
  "core_insight": "The platform combines the psychological thrill of confronting one's fears with the practical utility of personalized advice, all while delivering a highly engaging and memorable user experience.",
  "your_role": "presenter"
}
